Class BudgetAlert

java.lang.Object
Budget.BudgetAlert
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class BudgetAlert extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an alert generated by the system when a budget crosses a threshold.

US#5 seq: Budget.checkThreshold() → BudgetAlert.generate() → Notification.create(type, message)

US#10 seq: checkThreshold(): void → Budget → BudgetAlert.generate(): void → Notification.create(type:String, message:String): Notification

See Also:

    Legacy constructor (without userID).

  • Constructor Details

    • BudgetAlert

      public BudgetAlert()
      Constructs an empty BudgetAlert.

    • BudgetAlert

      public BudgetAlert(int budgetId, int userID, String type, String message)
      Constructs a new BudgetAlert.
      Parameters:
      budgetId - the ID of the budget triggering the alert
      userID - the ID of the user to notify
      type - the type of alert ("NEAR_LIMIT" or "EXCEEDED")
      message - the alert message text

    • BudgetAlert

      public BudgetAlert(int budgetId, String type, String message)
      Legacy constructor (without userID).
      Parameters:
      budgetId - the ID of the budget
      type - the type of alert
      message - the alert message text

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public void generate(String type, String message)
      Generates the alert and creates a corresponding system notification.

      US#5 seq: Budget → BudgetAlert.generate(): void BudgetAlert → Notification.create(type, message): Notification

      US#10 seq: BudgetAlert.generate(): void → Notification.create(type,message)

      Parameters:
      type - the new alert type
      message - the new alert message

    • create

      public BudgetAlert create(String type, String message)
      Creates and returns a new BudgetAlert instance based on current details.
      Parameters:
      type - the alert type
      message - the alert message
      Returns:
      a new populated BudgetAlert

    • send

      public void send()
      Simulates sending the alert directly.

    • markAsRead

      public void markAsRead()
      Marks this alert as read by the user.
